CustomField.description: Check this box after you approve the app in Public House and verify that the "Annual Income (Eligibility)" in Salesforce matches the "Income/Employment" income in Public House. Once verified, you can send the certification merge.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this box after you approve the app in Public House and verify that the "Annual Income (Eligibility)" in Salesforce matches the "Income/Employment" income in Public House. Once verified, you can send the certification merge.
CustomField.label: Verified Salesforce & PH Income Match
